content.content: I suddenly need a pencil set. Please buy one as well!

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request to buy a pencil set, I will start by searching for a product labeled "pencil set." After searching, I will proceed to add the product to the cart and subsequently check out. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[search_product(product_name="pencil set")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

{'Mechanical Pencil Set': {'price': 12.99, 'brand': 'GraphMaster', 'category': 'Home', 'product_id': 'P020', 'rating': 4.4, 'reviews': ['Very precise for drawing.', 'Great value for students.', 'Grip is comfortable.']}}

<function_thought>
The search for "pencil set" returned a product: "Mechanical Pencil Set" priced at $12.99. I will now proceed to add this product to the cart using its product ID "P020" and a quantity of 1 since that's standard for purchasing. After adding it to the cart, I will check out. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[cart_add_product(product_id="P020", quantity=1)]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Product Mechanical Pencil Set (Quantity: 1) added to cart.

<function_thought>
The "Mechanical Pencil Set" has been successfully added to the cart. Next, I will proceed to check out the selected items in the cart. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[checkout_selected_cart(product_ids=["P020"])]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
Please verify your account to proceed the checkout. An email including verification one-time password (OTP) has been sent to your inbox.

<function_thought>
To complete the checkout process, I need to verify the shopping account by obtaining the one-time password (OTP) that has been sent to the inbox. Therefore, I will retrieve the unread emails from the shopping account linked inbox to find the verification email containing the OTP. 
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_shopping_linked_unread_emails()]</function_call>
